summary: Tested 4 new features: (1) Primary/Secondary Coordinator role dropdowns in AdminSchoolCRM, (2) AI chat textarea auto-resize, (3) AI chat ticket_number assignment, (4) Summer Camp CRM mobile-responsive layout. All 14 backend+static tests pass. All frontend browser automation tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features from iteration 71 verified working: (1) School CRM contact role dropdowns have Primary Coordinator (primary_coordinator) and Secondary Coordinator (secondary_coordinator) in all 5 locations (edit modal ~L6343, renewal ~L7209, new lead ~L7942, conversion ~L9316, onboarding ~L10469). (2) AI chat textarea auto-resizes correctly - confirmed visually at 400px viewport width, textarea grew from 20px to 80px with multi-line text. Enter key sends message and resets input. (3) ai_chat.py raise_ticket handler calls await get_next_ticket_number() at line 454 and stores ticket_number in query_doc. (4) Summer Camp CRM: mobile card view (md:hidden) is visible at 390px, desktop table (hidden md:block) visible at 1920px and hidden on mobile. 70 table rows + 140 card elements confirmed. GET /api/summer-camp/bookings returns list of bookings. Backend health check healthy.
